name: resident_mm_perf
title: Resident Mm
desc: RESIDENT doorbell-driven matmul (keystone for the resident render grid): all 3 Tensix threads run INIT once then service one A@B per host doorbell ring, no reload. Proven bit-exact on silicon, 3-thread residency.

telemetry.note: elapsed cycles + event counts per zone; published to the L1 perf region at 0x169000. Decode pending — runner currently peeks the base word only.

note: bhtop resident canon (not a tt-llk import) — doorbell/for(;;) residency; see docs/RESIDENT_GRID.md
